notes.terminator: Commands end with '#'. Responses are '#'-terminated strings unless noted as 'Nothing'.

commands.description: Query alignment mounting mode
Enter Meade firmware downloader (proprietary)
Start Telescope Automatic Alignment Sequence

returns.0: Scope not AzEl mounted or alignment failed

commands.description: Sets telescope to Land alignment mode
Sets telescope to Polar alignment mode
Sets telescope to AltAz alignment mode
Set Altitude/Dec Antibacklash. <dd> is the backlash value.
Set Azimuth/RA Antibacklash. <dd> is the backlash value.
Increase reticule brightness
Decrease reticule brightness
Set reticle flash rate to <n>. LX200: 0..3; Autostar/Autostar II: 0..9
Set Reticule Duty flash duty cycle to <n>. LX200 GPS Only.
Synchronize telescope with current Selenographic coordinates
Synchronizes telescope position with currently selected database object coordinates

returns.LX200: A '#' terminated string with the name of the synced object
returns.Autostar_AutostarII: Static string: ' M31 EX GAL MAG 3.5 SZ178.0'#'

commands.description: Request string of bars indicating distance to current target location

returns.LX200: String of bar characters indicating distance
returns.Autostar_AutostarII: String containing one bar until slew complete, then null string

commands.description: Turn on tube exhaust fan (LX16"/Max/RCX) or accessory panel power (Autostar II)
Turn off tube exhaust fan (LX16"/Max/RCX) or accessory panel power (Autostar II)
Set corrector plate heater level. Max/RCX only.
Turn on switched 12V panel power. Max/RCX only.
Turn off switched 12V panel power. Max/RCX only.
Return Optical Tube Assembly temperature. Autostar II and Max/RCX.
commands.returns: <sdd.ddd># — '#'-terminated signed ASCII real number in Celsius

commands.description: Return corrector plate temperature. Max/RCX only.
commands.returns: <sdd.ddd># — '#'-terminated signed ASCII real number in Celsius

commands.description: Start focuser moving inward (toward objective)
Start focuser moving outward (away from objective)
Query focuser busy status. Max/RCX400 only.
Collimate command — starts corrector plate tilting in specified direction. Max/RCX only. Use :FQ# to halt.
Define current position as focuser preset <n>. Max/RCX only.
Assign focuser preset <n> the specified <name>. Max/RCX only.
Sync focuser to preset position <n>. Max/RCX only.
Pulse focuser (Autostar II) or move to absolute position in mm (Max/RCX).

params.AutostarII: sDDDD = signed milliseconds, -65000.0 to +65000.0. Positive=inward, Negative=outward

commands.description: Query digital focuser position. Max/RCX only.
Halt focuser motion
Set focus speed to fastest setting
Set focus speed to slowest setting
Set focuser speed to <n>. Autostar and Autostar II only.
Turn on GPS. Autostar II only.
Turn off GPS. Autostar II only.
Turn on NMEA GPS data stream. Autostar II only.
commands.returns: Next NMEA format string from GPS followed by '#'

commands.description: Power up GPS and update system time from GPS stream. May take several minutes. Interrupts handbox operations. Autostar II only.

returns.0: User interrupted or GPS timed out

commands.description: Get Alignment Menu Entry 0 [LX200 legacy]
Get Alignment Menu Entry 1 [LX200 legacy]
Get Alignment Menu Entry 2 [LX200 legacy]
Get local telescope time in 12-hour format
Get telescope altitude
commands.returns: sDD*MM# or sDD*MM'SS# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Get browse brighter magnitude limit — faintest object returned by FIND/BROWSE
Get current local calendar date
Get clock format
Get telescope declination
commands.returns: sDD*MM# or sDD*MM'SS# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Get currently selected object/target declination
commands.returns: sDD*MM# or sDD*MM'SS# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Get selenographic latitude. LX200gps/RCX only. Returns +99*99# if not pointing at Moon.
Get selenographic longitude. LX200gps/RCX only. West=negative. Returns +999*99# if not pointing at Moon.
Get find field diameter used in IDENTIFY/FIND commands
Get browse faint magnitude limit — brightest object returned by FIND/BROWSE
Get UTC offset time — hours to add to local time to get UTC
commands.returns: sHH# or sHH.H# (whole vs. fractional hours)

commands.description: Get current site longitude. East longitudes are negative.
Get Daylight Savings Time setting. Autostar II only.
Get high limit — highest mount-relative altitude telescope will slew to without warning
Get local time in 24-hour format
Get distance to meridian (LST-RA). Max only. Negative on German mount indicates off-side.
commands.returns: sDD*MM'SS# or sDD*MM# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Get larger size limit — smallest object size returned by FIND/BROWSE
Get site 1 name
Get site 2 name
Get site 3 name
Get site 4 name
Get backlash values. Autostar and Autostar II.
Get home data. Autostar II only.
Get sensor offsets (azerror, elerror, home position offset). Autostar II only.
Get lower limit — minimum elevation above horizon for slewing without 'Below Horizon' error
Get minimum quality for FIND operation
Get telescope RA
commands.returns: HH:MM.T# or HH:MM:SS# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Get current/target object RA
commands.returns: HH:MM.T# or HH:MM:SS# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Get sidereal time
Get smaller size limit — largest object returned by FIND command (in arcminutes)
Get tracking rate in Hz (60.0 Hz = 1 revolution in 24 hours)
Get current site latitude. Positive = North.
Get telescope firmware date
Get telescope firmware number
Get OTA focuser type
Get telescope product name
Get telescope firmware time
Get scope alignment status
Get deep sky object search string. Uppercase = class included; lowercase = ignored.
commands.returns: GPDCO# where G=Galaxies, P=Planetary Nebulas, D=Diffuse Nebulas, C=Globular Clusters, O=Open Clusters

commands.description: Get telescope azimuth
commands.returns: DDD*MM#T or DDD*MM'SS# depending on precision setting

commands.description: Calibrate home position. Causes aligned telescope to seek default home and remember alignment. Progress checkable with :h?#. Autostar II only.
Seek home position and set/align scope from encoder values in non-volatile memory.
Bypass handbox entry of daylight savings, date and time. Must be issued while telescope is waiting at initial daylight savings prompt. Intended for permanent installations without GPS.
Sleep telescope — power off motors, encoders, displays and lights. Wakes on keystroke or :hW#. Autostar II only.
Slew to park position
Set current scope position as park position. LX200 ignores this command.
Wake up sleeping telescope. Autostar II only.
Query home status
Toggle between 24-hour and 12-hour time format
Causes telescope to cease current operations and restart at power-on initialization. LX200 GPS only.
Find previous object and set as current target. Autostar II & Autostar: no function.
Set current target to deep sky catalog object number NNNN
Find object using current Size/Type/Limit/Quality constraints and set as current target. Autostar II & Autostar: no function.
Identify object in current field. Autostar II & Autostar: returns static string '0 - Objects found'.
commands.returns: <string># containing number of objects in field and object in center field

commands.description: Get object information — current target name and type. Autostar II & Autostar: returns static Andromeda Galaxy description.
Set current target to Messier Object NNNN
Find next deep sky target subject to current constraints. Autostar II & Autostar: no function.
Select deep sky library
Select star catalog

D.0: STAR library (not on Autostar I & II)

commands.description: Select star NNNN as current target from currently selected catalog
Slew to target Alt and Az. LX200: not supported.
Guide telescope North for DDDD milliseconds (serial port guiding). LX200: not supported.
Guide telescope South for DDDD milliseconds. LX200: not supported.
Guide telescope East for DDDD milliseconds. LX200: not supported.
Guide telescope West for DDDD milliseconds. LX200: not supported.
StarLock enable/disable. When enabled, StarLock autoguiding and HPP pointing are active. LX200: not supported.
Move telescope East at current slew rate
Move telescope North at current slew rate
Move telescope South at current slew rate
Move telescope West at current slew rate
Slew to target object
Toggle High Precision Pointing. When enabled, scope first centers a nearby bright star before moving to actual target.
Toggle Smart Drive PEC on/off for both axes. Not supported on Autostar.
Enable Dec/Alt PEC. Autostar II only.
Disable Dec/Alt PEC. Autostar II only.
Query number of points in the smart mount model. Autostar II only.
Read smart mount model point NNNNN. Autostar II only.
commands.returns: <n><n># — pair of ASCII numbers separated by space, '#'-terminated

commands.description:
Set smart mount model point

to values . All blank-terminated ASCII. Autostar II only.
Enable SmartMount. Autostar II only.
Disable SmartMount. Autostar II only.
Enable SmartMount Update Mode. Autostar II only.
Disable SmartMount Update Mode. Autostar II only.
Enable Text-To-Speech output. Autostar II only.
Disable Text-To-Speech output. Autostar II only.
Write smart mount model to non-volatile memory. Autostar II only.
Enable RA/AZ PEC compensation. Autostar II only.
Disable RA/AZ PEC compensation. LX200gps only.
Halt all current slewing
Halt eastward slews
Halt northward slews
Halt southward slews
Halt westward slews
Turn on field derotator. LX16" and Autostar II.
Turn off field derotator, halt slew in progress. LX16" and Autostar II.
Orient field rotator to North Up position. Autostar II only.
Mark current position as North Up for future reference. Autostar II only.
Start fast slew field rotator clockwise. Autostar II only.
Start fast slew field rotator counter-clockwise. Autostar II only.
Halt field derotator slew. Autostar II only.
Set slew rate to Centering rate (2nd slowest)
Set slew rate to Guiding Rate (slowest)
Set slew rate to Find Rate (2nd fastest)
Set slew rate to maximum (fastest)
Set RA/Azimuth slew rate to DD.D degrees per second. Autostar II only.
Set Dec/Elevation slew rate to DD.D degrees per second. Autostar II only.
Set guide rate to +/- SS.S arc seconds per second, added to/subtracted from current tracking rate. Must not exceed sidereal speed (~15.0417"/sec). Autostar II only.
Set target object altitude to sDD*MM or sDD*MM'SS. LX16", Autostar, Autostar II.
Set brighter magnitude limit
Set baud rate
commands.returns: 1 (at current baud rate, then switches to new rate)

commands.description: Change handbox date. For Autostar II this is UTC date.
Set target object declination to sDD*MM or sDD*MM:SS depending on precision setting
Set target object to specified selenographic latitude on the Moon

returns.1: Moon is up and coordinates accepted

commands.description: Set target object to specified selenographic longitude on the Moon

returns.1: Moon is up and coordinates accepted

commands.description: Set faint magnitude limit
Set FIELD/IDENTIFY field diameter
Set current site longitude. East longitudes expressed as negative.
Set hours added to local time to yield UTC
Set daylight savings time parameter. Autostar II only.
Set maximum object elevation limit
Set size of smallest object returned by FIND/BROWSE
Set local time

Disable smart mount flexure correction. Autostar II only.
Set site 1 name. LX200s: 3 chars max. Others: up to 15 chars.
Set site 2 name. LX200s: 3 chars max. Others: up to 15 chars.
Set site 3 name. LX200s: 3 chars max. Others: up to 15 chars.
Set lowest elevation to which telescope will slew
Set site 4 name. LX200s: 3 chars max. Others: up to 15 chars.
Set backlash values. Autostar and Autostar II.
Set home data. Autostar II only.
Set sensor offsets. Autostar II only.
Step quality limit used in FIND/BROWSE through cycle VP..SU. Query with :Gq#.
Set target object RA (low precision)
Set target object RA (high precision)
Set size of largest object FIND/BROWSE will return
Set local sidereal time
Set current site latitude. Positive = North.
Set current tracking rate in Hz. 60.0000 Hz = one RA revolution in 24 hours. Autostar II only.
Increment manual rate by 0.1 Hz
Decrement manual rate by 0.1 Hz
Disable Altitude SmartDrive (PEC). Autostar II only.
Enable Altitude SmartDrive (PEC). Autostar II only.
Disable RA/Azimuth SmartDrive (PEC). Autostar II only.
Enable RA/Azimuth SmartDrive (PEC). Autostar II only.
Set maximum slew rate to N degrees per second
Set object selection string for FIND/BROWSE. Uppercase=include class, lowercase=exclude.

params.GPDCO: G=Galaxies, P=Planetary Nebulas, D=Diffuse Nebulas, C=Globular Clusters, O=Open Clusters

commands.description: Set target object azimuth. LX16" and Autostar II only.
Increment manual tracking rate by 0.1 Hz
Decrement manual tracking rate by 0.1 Hz
Set Lunar tracking rate
Select custom tracking rate (no-op in Autostar II)
Select sidereal tracking rate
Select Solar tracking rate. LS only.
Toggle between low and high precision positions. Low: HH:MM.T / sDD*MM. High: HH:MM:SS / sDD*MM:SS.
Read Dec PEC Table Entry NNNN. Autostar II and Classic 16" only. PecRate = TheoreticalRate * sD.DDD for this segment.
Read RA PEC Table Entry NNNN. Autostar II and Classic 16" only. PecRate = TheoreticalRate * sD.DDD for this segment.
Set current site
Set help text cursor to start of first line
commands.returns: <string># — first string of general handbox help file

commands.description: Retrieve next line of help text

commands.description: Retrieve previous line of help text
